activity.detailedModeNotAvailable: Detailed mode not available for this activity type.

ratting.title: Ratting Configuration Guide
ratting.description: Learn how to configure and maximize your automatic profit tracking with Ratting.
ratting.characterPreparationText: For automatic tracking to work, your characters must be linked to EasyEve with the correct permissions.
ratting.walletScopeHelp: It is essential that the character has the Wallet Journal read scope active. Without this, EasyEve cannot see Bounties and ESS payments.
ratting.activeTokensHelp: Check on the characters screen if the token status is green. Expired tokens prevent synchronization.
ratting.stepAText: Click on "Start New Activity" and select the Ratting icon (red crosshair).
ratting.stepBText: Select the characters that will participate in the fleet and the local NPC Faction.
ratting.note: The system uses Faction and Site Name to suggest the best bonuses and calculate estimates.
ratting.iskSyncText: EasyEve doesn't "read your screen", it queries the CCP server for new wallet journal entries.
ratting.bountyTicksHelp: Synchronized every 20 minutes (standard game time). Use the "Sync ESI" button to update.
ratting.essPayoutsHelp: Appear in the wallet about 3 hours after the activity. If you close the activity, EasyEve will continue monitoring for 4 more hours.
ratting.importantText: CCP ESI may have a cache delay of up to 5 minutes. If you just received the tick in-game, wait a few moments before syncing.
ratting.expertTip1: Prioritize Havens (Rock) and Sanctums for best ISK/Hour in Nullsec.
ratting.expertTip2: Always click "Sync ESI" before finishing the activity to ensure the last tick was captured.
ratting.expertTip3: ISK/hr calculation considers net profit accumulated divided by total operation time.

settings.title: Settings
settings.clearDataWarning: This action will permanently remove all your saved Activities and Fits. Your account and linked characters will not be affected.
settings.clearDataWarning2: Attention: This action cannot be undone. We recommend exporting your data before proceeding.
settings.dataManagementDesc: Manage your local and cloud data
